backfill.title: Historical Data Backfill
backfill.description: Writes Yahoo stock/index, TEFAS fund, TCMB FX and BIST DataStore bond/VIOP history into price_history. No synthetic data is generated.
backfill.loadingDescription: Price history is being fetched from selected sources; this may take a few minutes.

validation.selectType: Select at least one instrument type

simulation.title: Simulation Mode
simulation.description: Test with realistic market data without real APIs
simulation.enableDesc: When enabled, simulated data is used instead of real APIs
simulation.info1: Generates simulated market data for stocks, FX, indices, bonds, funds and VIOP
simulation.info2: Tests cache, listing, portfolio and alert flows without waiting for real API calls
simulation.info3: Runs volatility/trend scenarios using GBM and Mean Reversion algorithms
simulation.info4: Crypto simulation is removed from system scope

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage the API keys you use to fetch market data.
apiKeys.addDescription: Add a new API key. You must test before saving.
apiKeys.editDescription: Update existing API key. Enter new key and test.
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

placeholder.tcmb: Not required for TCMB (can leave empty)

validation.tcmbInfo: TCMB is free, test to verify.
validation.optionalInfo: API key is optional, you can leave it empty.

ALPHA_VANTAGE.title: Alpha Vantage
ALPHA_VANTAGE.desc: Good for global stocks but limited.

TEFAS.title: TEFAS
TEFAS.desc: Public/no-key provider for TEFAS fund data.
missing: Adapter updates may be needed when site contract changes

BIST_DATASTORE.title: BIST DataStore
BIST_DATASTORE.desc: Reads debt securities and VIOP data from Borsa Istanbul public files and bulletins.
missing: Adapter must be updated if BIST file formats change

FINTABLES.title: Fintables
FINTABLES.desc: Turkey-focused provider for BIST, fund and technical analytics data.
missing: Depends on API plan and quota

LLM_ENRICHMENT.title: LLM News Enrichment
LLM_ENRICHMENT.desc: Enriches RSS news with summary, sentiment and keywords (GitHub Models/OpenAI-compatible).
